{{CargoClone
|name=Fire Earthly Demon
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1023
|gene1={race} HARD +100
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=Fire DMG +50
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5={race} Leadership +1
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7={race} Leadership +3
|}}
